task_completion.description: Open the personal lending log in a spreadsheet application
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows a spreadsheet application (like LibreOffice Calc) open with the personal lending log data containing items like Circular Saw and Pressure Washer.

task_completion.description: Add a new column for days on loan
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new column header such as 'Days on Loan', 'Duration', or similar is visible in the spreadsheet.

task_completion.description: Calculate the number of days each item has been on loan
task_completion.visual_evidence: The cells under the new 'Days on Loan' column contain numerical values representing the duration (e.g., numbers in the 400-600 range for the unreturned items).

Unreturned items are clearly distinguished in the spreadsheet, for example by filtering the view to only show items with no return date, sorting them together, or adding a clear status label. There should be 6 unreturned items visible.

The rows or specific cells for the 6 unreturned/overdue items (Circular Saw, Pressure Washer, Pasta Maker, Board Game Wingspan, Kayak Paddle, Extension Ladder) are visually highlighted with a distinct background color (e.g., red, yellow, or another highlighting color).

integrity.description: Agent used a graphical spreadsheet application
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen interacting with a GUI spreadsheet application (e.g., LibreOffice Calc) rather than just editing raw CSV text in a terminal or text editor.
The highlighting is applied using spreadsheet cell formatting (background color/fill), not just text symbols like asterisks or markdown added to the item names.

integrity.description: Agent updated the actual log rather than typing a summary
integrity.visual_evidence: The original tabular structure of the lending log is maintained and updated; the agent did not simply create a new blank text document and type out the answers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains 10 items total. Exactly 6 items are unreturned: Circular Saw, Pressure Washer, Pasta Maker, Board Game Wingspan, Kayak Paddle, and Extension Ladder. As of the system date (March 7, 2026), all 6 unreturned items have been on loan for over 30 days (ranging from 462 to 600 days). The VLM should verify that these specific 6 items are the ones identified as unreturned and highlighted as overdue.
